## Security And Product Language

- [ ] This does not require hardcoded API keys, private keys, bearer tokens, webhook secrets, or wallet files.
- [ ] This does not claim production Visa issuance or a spendable production card unless that capability is implemented and verified.
- [ ] This calls the MVP output a simulated virtual card.
- [ ] This says Casper mainnet CSPR for native payments.
- [ ] This says mockUSDC CEP-18 only when referring to the mock/test token rail.
